name: Cheese Pudding Pie
recipeIngredient: Jello instant chocolate mix, package (6 3/4 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the ingredients for the crust: flour, chopped nuts, and butter. Press into a pie pan.
2. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 20 minutes.
3. Prepare the chocolate pudding according to the package instructions.
4. In a mixer, combine sugar and cream cheese.
5. Fold in half of the Cool Whip topping.
6. Pour the mixture onto the crust.
7. Add the prepared chocolate pudding.
8. Top with the remaining Cool Whip topping.
9. Sprinkle broken pecans over the top.
10. Refrigerate before serving.
